name: TSMC's annual revenue
descriptionShort: Annual revenue of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC), in US dollars. TSMC is a semiconductor foundry that manufactures advanced chips for other companies, including processors used in AI, smartphones, computers, and other technologies. This data is not adjusted for inflation.
descriptionProcessing: We converted values from New Taiwan dollars to US dollars using annual average exchange rates from the Central Bank of the Republic of China (Taiwan).
descriptionKey: TSMC (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company) is a semiconductor foundry that manufactures computer chips for other companies, including processors used in AI, smartphones, computers, and other technologies.
The figures come from TSMC's own financial reports, are self-reported by the company, and are originally reported in New Taiwan dollars.
We converted revenue figures from New Taiwan dollars to US dollars using the exchange rates from the Central Bank of the Republic of China (Taiwan). This data is not adjusted for inflation.

Data covers the period from 2006 onwards. Consolidated reporting, which combines the financial results of TSMC and all its subsidiaries into unified statements, began in 2013. Pre-2013 figures may be reported on a different basis.

origins.title: TSMC Monthly Revenue
origins.description:
Historical monthly revenue data from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC), reported in millions of New Taiwan Dollars (NT$).

The data includes consolidated monthly revenue figures starting from 2006, covering all months from January through December for each year.
origins.citationFull: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited (TSMC) - Investor Relations Monthly Revenue Reports

origins.title: Daily TWD/USD Exchange Rate
origins.description:
Daily closing interbank spot market exchange rates between New Taiwan Dollar (NTD/TWD) and US Dollar (USD) from the Central Bank of the Republic of China (Taiwan).
The exchange rate represents how many TWD are needed to purchase one USD.
origins.producer: Central Bank of the Republic of China (Taiwan)
origins.citationFull: Central Bank of the Republic of China (Taiwan) - Daily Exchange Rates
